human_ost_q1.title: 1. Situations requiring additional Human Research Regulatory Agency/DOD review?
human_ost_q1.description: Special Topics may include: Planned emergency research involving Exception from Informed Consent (EFIC); Large scale genomic data from DOD-affiliated personnel; Fetal tissue research (not including embryonic cell lines); Sensitive use of human cadavers. IF YES PROMPTLY NOTIFY REGULATORY OFFICE DIRECTOR/DEPUTY DIRECTOR AND PLAN FOR ADDITIONAL TIME FOR REVIEW
